name: CHS INC
summary: CHS Inc. is the nation's leading integrated agricultural cooperative, owned by farmers, ranchers, and member cooperatives across the U.S. It provides grain origination and marketing, agronomy products (crop nutrients, crop protection), petroleum refining and distribution (gasoline, diesel, propane, lubricants) under the Cenex brand, renewable fuels, and food products. For fiscal year ended August 31, 2025, CHS reported total revenues of $35.5 billion and net income of $597.9 million.

products.name: Gasoline
products.description: Refined gasoline produced at Laurel, MT and McPherson, KS refineries, sold wholesale under the Cenex brand.

products.name: Diesel Fuel
products.description: Refined diesel fuel produced at Laurel and McPherson refineries and distributed to member cooperatives and retailers.

products.name: Propane
products.description: Wholesale propane distributed primarily for heating and agricultural use; CHS is one of the nation's largest propane wholesalers by revenue.

products.name: Asphalt
products.description: Asphalt produced primarily at the Laurel, Montana refinery as part of refined petroleum product mix.

products.name: Lubricants
products.description: Auto and farm equipment lubricants blended, packaged and wholesaled to members and nonmembers.

products.name: Crop Nutrients
products.description: Wholesale agronomy crop nutrient products sold through the Ag segment to agricultural producers and cooperatives.

products.name: Crop Protection Products
products.description: Wholesale crop protection products sold through the Ag segment to agricultural producers and cooperatives.

products.name: Grain and Oilseed Marketing
products.description: Origination and marketing of grain and oilseed, including operations at export terminals.

products.name: Soybean Meal, Soy Oil, Soyflour
products.description: Processed soybean products including meal, refined soy oil, and soyflour sold through the Ag segment.

products.name: Renewable Fuels
products.description: Production and marketing of renewable fuels through the Ag segment.

products.name: Processed Sunflowers and Feed
products.description: Retail sales of processed sunflowers, feed and farm supplies through the Ag segment.

partnerships.description: Equity method investment comprising CHS's Nitrogen Production segment for nitrogen fertilizer production.
Nonconsolidated food production and distribution joint venture included in Corporate and Other segment.
Nonconsolidated wheat milling joint venture included in Corporate and Other segment.
Joint venture for grain export operations; equity income recorded in the Ag segment.
